name: SolvaPay
oneliner: Stockholm-based startup building machine-native payment rails that let AI agents discover, negotiate, and pay for services autonomously across platforms. €2.4M pre-seed from Redstone, MS&AD Ventures, and Antler.
team: Founding team alumni from Spotify, FIS, Bank of America, Lehman Brothers, and Handelsbanken. Round led by Redstone and MS&AD Ventures, with Antler and Greens Ventures participating.
finserv: Founding team brings 50+ years combined experience at FIS, Bank of America, Lehman Brothers, and Handelsbanken — heavy regulated finserv DNA. Positioned explicitly for the agentic economy with agent-to-agent transaction discovery and settlement.
thesis: SolvaPay is a candidate for the machine-native payment layer the agentic app store needs. The Stockholm base answers the recurring 'Europe equivalent?' scout request. At pre-seed, there is maximum opportunity to shape product direction toward the regulated financial agent context. The team's FIS/BoA/Lehman DNA suggests they understand the compliance constraints that matter for institutional deployment.
